mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM turquoise_showroom WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND showroom_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{showroomName}, '%')
ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM turquoise_showroom WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND showroom_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{showroomName}, '%')
SELECT * FROM turquoise_showroom WHERE showroom_id = #{showroomId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO turquoise_showroom (showroom_name, showroom_desc, cover_img, sort, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{showroomName}, #{showroomDesc}, #{coverImg}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE turquoise_showroom SET showroom_name = #{showroomName}, showroom_desc = #{showroomDesc}, cover_img = #{coverImg}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE showroom_id = #{showroomId}

UPDATE turquoise_showroom SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE showroom_id IN
#{id}
